prompt: For all items from manufacturer ID 128, report total extended store sales price by brand and by year, for store sales that occurred in the 11th month of the year. Order by year, then revenue descending, then brand id; limit to 100 rows.

For store sales in the year 2000, report the average quantity, average list price, average coupon amount, and average sales price for each item. Restrict to sales made to male, single customers with a 'College' education, and to promotions that were not advertised by email or not part of an event. Order by item id; limit 100 rows.

For items managed by manager ID 8, report total extended store sales price by brand and manufacturer, for store sales in November 1998 where the customer's home ZIP code differs (in its first 5 digits) from the selling store's ZIP code. Order by revenue descending, then brand and manufacturer; limit 100 rows.

For catalog sales in the year 2000, report the average quantity, average list price, average coupon amount, and average sales price for each item. Restrict to sales made to male, single customers with a 'College' education, and to promotions not advertised by email or not part of an event. Order by item id; limit 100 rows.

For store sales in the 11th month of year 2000, report total extended sales price by item category, restricted to items managed by manager ID 1. Order by total descending, then year, category id, and category; limit 100 rows.

For each store, report total store sales price split into seven separate day-of-the-week totals (Sunday through Saturday), for sales in the year 2000, restricted to stores with a GMT offset of -5. Order by store name and store id; limit 100 rows.
For store sales in the 11th month of year 1999, report total extended sales price by brand, restricted to items managed by manager ID 28. Order by total descending, then brand id; limit 100 rows.

List the item id, description, and current price of items whose current price is between 62 and 92, that are from manufacturers 129, 270, 821, or 423, that had between 100 and 500 units of inventory on hand during 2000-05-25 to 2000-07-24, and that appear in store sales. Order by item id; limit 100 rows.

List the customer id and full name (formatted as 'last name, first name') of customers who live in the city of Edgewood, whose household income band falls between 38128 and 88128, and who have at least one store return. Order by customer id; limit 100 rows.

Count the store sale line items that were sold in the 8 PM hour at or after minute 30, at the store named 'ese', to customers whose household has a dependent count of 7. Order by the count; limit 100 rows.
